
```{python}
# | echo: false
# | fig-align: "center"
import verovio
from IPython.display import SVG, display

tk = verovio.toolkit()

tk.setOptions({"scale": 50, "pageWidth": 1000, "adjustPageHeight": 1, "inputFrom": "abc", "footer": "none"})

abc_data = """
X: 1
T: Nothing
M: 4/4
L: 1/4
K: C
C D E F | G A B c |]
"""

tk.loadData(abc_data)

display(SVG(tk.renderToSVG()))
```

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | fig-align: "center"
import verovio
from IPython.display import SVG, display

tk = verovio.toolkit()

tk.setOptions({"scale": 50, "pageWidth": 1000, "adjustPageHeight": 1, "inputFrom": "abc", "footer": "none"})

abc_data = """
X: 1
T: Simple Scale
M: 4/4
L: 1/4
K: C
C D E F | G A B c |]
"""

tk.loadData(abc_data)

display(SVG(tk.renderToSVG()))
```
